title: Weather App
description: A modern weather application that shows real-time weather data, temperature, humidity, and forecasts using API integration.
details: Integrated weather API to fetch real-time data
Built responsive UI using modern design principles

title: To-Do List App
description: A simple and interactive task management app to organize daily activities with add, delete, and mark-as-complete features.
details: Implemented add, delete, and update tasks

title: Calculator App
description: A responsive calculator application that performs basic arithmetic operations with a clean and user-friendly interface.
details: Performed arithmetic operations (add, subtract, multiply, divide)
Handled user input and edge cases
Built responsive UI with clean layout

title: E-commerce Website
description: An online shopping platform with product listing, cart functionality, and a modern UI built using React and Tailwind.
details: Developed product listing and category filtering
Built responsive UI using Tailwind CSS

title: Social Media App
description: A full-stack social media application where users can create posts, interact, and manage content with authentication and real-time updates.
details: Users can create, edit, and delete posts
